description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named Nightly CEA builds that runs every weekday at 2am UTC. The workflow should trigger a matrix build and test job on a self-hosted cuda runner for various backend configurations, including OpenMP and CUDA with different settings. For each backend, checkout the repository, initialize the build tree with specific CMake settings, start, update, and configure the build, build the project, run tests, and submit the results.
